overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving through a heavy snowstorm at night in a truck simulator game. The vehicle follows another car along a winding snow-covered mountain road before entering a well-lit tunnel. The interior features a decorative hanging curtain and GPS navigation screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain highway with high snow banks

events.description: truck navigates a gentle right curve on the winding mountain road
tunnel entrance becomes visible ahead as the truck approaches the tunnel

agents.ego_description: driving a truck through heavy snowfall at night, maintaining steady speed while following a vehicle ahead on the winding road

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead on the snowy road, maintaining consistent distance from the truck

entered.detail: white tassel curtain hanging above the windshield with gold trim
illuminated navigation display showing the route map on the dashboard
two-lane highway covered in snow with visible tire tracks and yellow dividing line
high banks of plowed snow lining the left side of the road
high banks of plowed snow lining the right side of the road
dense evergreen trees heavily covered in snow on the mountainside
snow-laden trees and rocky terrain on the right hillside
yellow diamond-shaped warning sign indicating a curve in the road ahead
dark tunnel mouth becoming visible at the end of the snowy road

segments.scene_description: The truck drives through a heavy snowstorm at night on a winding mountain highway. High snow banks line both sides of the road, with snow-covered trees visible on the hillsides. The truck follows a white car ahead, navigating gentle curves past a yellow warning sign. The interior shows a decorative curtain and GPS screen, while the dark tunnel entrance gradually becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete highway tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: dramatic shift from dark snowy exterior to bright artificial tunnel lighting as the truck enters the tunnel
transition from open snowy mountain road to enclosed tunnel structure with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive through the tunnel at steady speed, maintaining safe following distance from the vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: same white car continuing ahead inside the tunnel, red taillights visible against the concrete walls

entered.detail: dry asphalt road surface inside the tunnel with clear lane markings
smooth concrete tunnel walls with black and yellow striped warning markers
concrete walls with embedded circular lighting fixtures illuminating the passage
bright overhead lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling and walls

segments.scene_description: The truck enters the well-lit tunnel, transitioning from the snowy exterior to the enclosed concrete corridor. The artificial lighting creates a stark contrast to the dark night outside, illuminating the smooth asphalt road. The same white car continues ahead, its red taillights reflecting off the tunnel walls as the truck maintains a steady following distance through the straight passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it transitions from a chaotic nocturnal snowstorm into the sterile environment of a lit tunnel. It begins on a winding mountain highway, navigating through heavy snowfall and high snow banks while following a white car past a yellow warning sign. As the truck moves forward, the interior details of a decorative curtain and GPS screen remain visible while the dark mouth of a tunnel gradually emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts abruptly as the vehicle enters the enclosed concrete corridor, replacing the dark, snowy exterior with bright artificial lighting and smooth asphalt. Finally, the camera maintains a steady distance behind the white car, whose red taillights reflect off the tunnel walls as the truck proceeds through the straight passage.
